description_long: This bungalow is a single-story residential building set within a large, rectangular, tree-lined lot. The structure features a flat roof with multiple sections, including a rooftop terrace and solar panels. The front facade is defined by a paved driveway leading to the main entrance, while the rear includes a spacious patio area with a swimming pool, outdoor seating, and a garage. The property is surrounded by manicured lawns, a perimeter of evenly spaced trees, and several outdoor amenities such as a playground and a small shed. Windows are arranged in a mostly symmetrical pattern, providing ample natural light to the interior. The exterior is finished in light-colored materials, giving the bungalow a modern and clean appearance.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a spacious yard featuring a pool and outdoor amenities. The property is enclosed by a tree-lined perimeter and includes a driveway, garage, and recreational areas.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main entrance, paved driveway, and a large lawn bordered by trees, with the house centrally positioned.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the garage, driveway, and a glimpse of the pool area, as well as additional outdoor seating and amenities.
description_view_2: The rear view reveals the swimming pool, patio, garage, and more of the backyard, with the house's flat roof and terrace visible.
description_view_3: This angle shows the side yard, pool, a small shed, and the tree-lined boundary, with the house's modern lines and outdoor features in view.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and rear windows
